occupation: Chief Executive Officer & Managing Director at Motio
headline: Chief Executive Officer & Managing Director Motio Limited
summary: As the CEO & MD of Motio Limited, a leading data-driven marketing and media company, I am passionate about delivering innovative and effective solutions for clients across various industries. With over 25 years of experience in the marketing and media sector, I have a proven track record of driving growth, innovation, and customer satisfaction. I have led and managed multiple teams and businesses, such as oOh!, Inlink, and EYE Corp Media, and have developed and executed successful strategies for place-based, digital, and online advertising. I have also acquired and integrated several businesses to expand Motio's portfolio and capabilities. Some of the skills that I bring to the table are sales, strategy adn monetisation, marketing communications, digital marketing, online advertising, business development, and strategic leadership. I am committed to creating value for shareholders, stakeholders, and partners, and to fostering a culture of excellence, collaboration, and diversity within Motio and the industry.

recommendations:
Blair Hamilford

I had the pleasure of working with Adam on the Senior Executive Team at oOh!media. Adam is a real innovator with a keen eye for creating value for the businesses under his stewardship. His dynamic and energetic approach to everything he does is contagious, inspiring colleagues and clients to get on board. Adam's stand out skill is his ability to create a vision, articulate it in a meaningful way and strive everyone towards it.  One of Adam's outstanding achievements was the creation and growth of oOh!'s Locate network marrying place-based media with dynamic, relevant content that truly engages audiences and provides excellent value to advertisers.

Lisa Omagari

Adam is one of the single most professional, strategic, and driven people I've worked with. His passion for the Out-of-Home industry is infectious and his enviable list of achievements makes him one of the most qualified thought leaders in the space.Adam's supreme leadership skills set him apart from most and his ability to coach and corral others towards shared goals keeps him head and shoulders above the rest. Adam has been responsible for shaping the careers of many young media professionals coming through the ranks and I'd relish the opportunity to work with him again. A man of rare intelligence, vision and precision, I recommend him wholeheartedly.
